enable_capture_environment.description: Add capture="environment" to file inputs on mobile so the rear camera opens directly

mobile_breakpoint_lg_px.description: Viewport width (px) below which the off-canvas sidebar drawer is shown (default 1024)

mobile_breakpoint_md_px.description: Viewport width (px) below which DataTable switches to card mode and topbar enters compact mode (default 768)

min_touch_target_px.description: Minimum touch target size in pixels for interactive elements on mobile (default 44, per Apple HIG)

default_card_mode_below_md.description: Automatically switch DataTable rows to card layout when the viewport is below the md breakpoint
